clean_text:
TENDER DOCUMENT
CENTRAL RESERVE POLICE FORCE (CRPF)
DIRECTORATE GENERAL, CGO COMPLEX, LODHI ROAD, NEW DELHI - 110003
NOTICE INVITING TENDER (NIT) NO: CRPF/DG/PROC/2025-26/MOCK-001
TENDER FOR: SUPPLY, INSTALLATION AND COMMISSIONING OF INTEGRATED
COMMUNICATION INFRASTRUCTURE FOR CRPF SECTOR OFFICES
SECTION 1: NOTICE INVITING TENDER
1.1 CRPF invites sealed competitive bids from eligible firms for the
    procurement of integrated communication infrastructure.
1.2 Estimated cost: Rs. 45,00,00,000 (Forty-Five Crore Rupees)
1.3 Earnest Money Deposit (EMD): Rs. 90,00,000 (Ninety Lakh Rupees)
1.4 Bid validity: 180 days from date of submission
SECTION 3: QUALIFICATION / ELIGIBILITY CRITERIA (MANDATORY)
3.1 FINANCIAL QUALIFICATION CRITERIA
    3.1.1 ANNUAL TURNOVER:
    The bidder shall have a minimum annual turnover of Rs. 15 crore
    in each of the last three financial years (FY 2022-23, FY 2023-24,
    FY 2024-25) as evidenced by audited financial statements certified
    by a Chartered Accountant.
    Documents required: Audited Balance Sheets and Profit & Loss
    Accounts for FY 2022-23, FY 2023-24, and FY 2024-25.
3.2 TECHNICAL QUALIFICATION CRITERIA
    3.2.1 SIMILAR WORKS EXPERIENCE:
    The bidder must have successfully executed at least 3 similar projects
    completed in the last 5 years involving supply and installation of
    communication or networking equipment for government organizations.
    "Similar project" means any project with a value exceeding Rs. 10 crore
    involving structured cabling, networking, or communication systems.
    Documents required:
    - Work Order copies from client
    - Project Completion Certificates from client organization
    - Performance certificate indicating satisfactory completion
3.3 COMPLIANCE CRITERIA (MANDATORY)
    3.3.1 GST REGISTRATION:

    Valid GST registration certificate is mandatory. Bidders must hold
    a valid GSTIN registered under the Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017.
    Non-submission of GST certificate will result in disqualification.
    3.3.2 PAN CARD:
    Permanent Account Number (PAN) card issued by Income Tax Department
    is mandatory. PAN number must be provided in the bid.
    3.3.3 EPF/ESI REGISTRATION:
    EPF registration certificate from EPFO and ESI registration
    certificate from ESIC are mandatory for bidders with more than
    20 employees. Statutory compliance with labour laws is required.
3.4 DOCUMENTATION CRITERIA
    3.4.1 ISO 9001 CERTIFICATION:
    Valid ISO 9001:2015 Quality Management System certification from
    an accredited certification body is mandatory. Certificate must
    be valid as on the date of bid submission.
    3.4.2 OHSAS / ISO 45001 CERTIFICATION:
    Bidders are required to hold a valid OHSAS 18001 or ISO 45001
    occupational health and safety management system certification.
SECTION 5: INSTRUCTIONS TO BIDDERS
5.1 Bids not meeting eligibility criteria in Section 3 will be
    summarily rejected without further evaluation.
5.2 Documents submitted must be self-attested. Originals may be
    called for verification.
5.3 All financial statements must be in Indian Rupees.
5.4 The evaluation committee's decision on eligibility shall be final.
ANNEXURE I   ELIGIBILITY COMPLIANCE STATEMENT
The bidder hereby confirms that:
a) Annual turnover exceeds Rs. 15 crore for each of the last 3 years.
b) At least 3 similar projects completed in last 5 years.
c) Valid GST registration is held.
d) Valid PAN card is held.
e) EPF and ESI registration is held.
f) ISO 9001:2015 certification is valid and current.
g) OHSAS 18001 / ISO 45001 certification is valid and current.
END OF TENDER DOCUMENT   MOCK-001
